title: cyphia alba
intro: Cyphia alba, also known as White Cyphian or White Cyphia, is a plant species belonging to the family Campanulaceae. Traditionally, Cyphia alba has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as treating respiratory issues, reducing fever, and alleviating gastrointestinal problems. Cyphia alba can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for various forms of administration and utilization in traditional medicine.
